name: grade5-reading-brainlift
description: Self-contained brief + operator manual for the live Grade-5 reading course g5-reading-merged-pp-9802: the design argument (leak-by-format, per-item cross-family certification, conversion by rewrite), the live-verified build state, the review context, and the operations layer — auth, live reads, the anti-leak gate, regen with rollback, feedback authoring, probes. Fully portable: bundled references/ carry the per-item ledger, evidence summary, decision memo, BrainLift, dated pull record, and cover email; bundled scripts/ include a stdlib-only TimeBack API client — no repository access required, only API credentials.
